untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) price piercing a specific defended level with historical test count tracking (min 15 prior tests) — requires level memory/tracking not available in indicator list; (2) bid-ask spread widening measurement — no spread indicator in allowed set; (3) post-breakout trading inactivity zone detection (50+ pips with no activity) — requires order flow/activity tracking not in indicators. Approximated with range (bar size) and volatility expansion (hvol_20), but this loses the essential defended-level and poor-fill context.
translation_notes: Converted 'violently pierces defended level' to large range + volatility spike (hvol_20 >= 150% = 1.5x baseline). Converted 'no trading activity for 50 pips' to volatility measure as proxy. Converted exit conditions to reversal below pivot + profit target. The core logic of heavily-defended level recognition and bid-ask spread monitoring cannot be fully captured without order book or level-tracking indicators.
